description: The event registration form allows users to proceed to the next step even if they haven't filled out all the required fields on the current step.
expectedOutcome: When the bug is fixed, users will not be able to proceed to the next step of the event registration form until all required fields on the current step are filled out correctly. An error message should be displayed if any required fields are missing.
hint: Search for the bug in EventRegistration.jsx and verify the logic handles the failing case correctly.
solution: The root cause is a logic error in src/components/EventRegistration.jsx. The fix should correct the condition or return value so the application behaves as expected. Verify the change resolves the failing scenario.
playwrightTests: Playwright tests should fail before the fix and pass after the fix for the same scenario.
playwrightTestSnippets: tests/app.spec.js - Playwright tests for fail-then-pass validation
